title: Digital Consumer Technology: The Revolution Has Started — Aberdeen Webinar
author: Peter S. Kastner
abstract: Promotional announcement for a 1-hour Aberdeen webinar on Nov 1, 2002 featuring Peter Kastner (EVP/CRO), Russ Craig (Research Director, Semiconductors), and Isaac Ro (Research Associate, Emerging Technologies). Three topics: mobile convergence devices, home media servers, and home networking challenges. Frames DCT as an arena of blurring product boundaries and emergent firms.
importance_rationale: Marks a formal Aberdeen DCT practice public deliverable; captures Kastner's 2002 framing of DCT as a converging category.
relevance_rationale: Topical framing (mobile convergence, media servers, home networking) presaged the smartphone/streaming/mesh-WiFi eras.
prescience_rationale: Mobile convergence devices (smartphones), home media servers (cloud streaming), and home networking (mesh WiFi) all became mainstream as predicted.
